org.springframework.data.cassandra.core

    Builds a new InsertOptions with the configured values.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    <T> CompletableFuture<EntityWriteResult<T>>
    AsyncCassandraOperations.insert(T entity, InsertOptions options)
    Insert the given entity applying WriteOptions and return the entity if the insert was applied.

    AsyncCassandraTemplate.insert(T entity, InsertOptions options)
     
    <T> EntityWriteResult<T>
    CassandraOperations.insert(T entity, InsertOptions options)
    Insert the given entity applying WriteOptions and return the entity if the insert was applied.

    CassandraTemplate.insert(T entity, InsertOptions options)
     
    <T> Mono<EntityWriteResult<T>>
    ReactiveCassandraOperations.insert(T entity, InsertOptions options)
    Insert the given entity applying WriteOptions and emit the entity if the insert was applied.
    <T> Mono<EntityWriteResult<T>>
    ReactiveCassandraTemplate.insert(T entity, InsertOptions options)
